claim_text: Among tetraploid wheat genotypes, wild emmer TR39477 shows the highest drought tolerance, durum cv. Kiziltan moderate tolerance, and TTD-22 the lowest tolerance under drought stress.

value.raw_value_text: Ergen and colleagues surveyed drought response of several genotypes of wild and domesticated tetraploid wheat varieties; they were able to show that wild emmer wheat, genotype TR39477, exhibits the highest drought tolerance while TTD-22 genotype has the lowest tolerance underdrought stress. Ontheother hand, durum wheat varietyKiziltanshoweda moderate tolerance in response to slow drought imposition

Ontheother hand, durum wheat varietyKiziltanshoweda moderate tolerance in response to slow drought imposition
